subcodes.title: Words to a French-speaking Hungarian, spoken on 1913-04-11
subcodes.first_line: If you desire to love God, love thy fellow man. If them you can see the image and likeness of God. If you are eager to serve God, serve mankind.
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
